overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a dark, atmospheric forest at night. The character travels along a winding cobblestone and dirt path, crossing a wooden rope bridge over marshy water, with dense trees and stone structures lining the route.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail with mossy cobblestone and stone retaining walls

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the cobblestone forest path with swords on his back, flanked by stone walls and dense trees

entered.detail: low moss-covered stone wall running along the left side of the path
low moss-covered stone wall running along the right side of the path
tall twisted oak trees with dense canopy creating a dark tunnel effect
thick overhead tree cover blocking most of the night sky
worn cobblestone trail with patches of moss and grass growing between stones

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a narrow cobblestone trail enclosed by stone retaining walls and dense ancient forest. The path winds through towering trees with thick canopy overhead, creating a dark, atmospheric tunnel effect in the blue-tinted night light.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden rope bridge crossing over marshy water

events.description: path transitions from cobblestone to wooden plank bridge with rope railings

agents.ego_description: Geralt crossing the wooden rope bridge over the marshy water below

entered.detail: weathered wooden footbridge with gaps between planks spanning the marsh
thick rope handrails supported by wooden posts on the bridge sides
dark stagnant water with reeds and marsh vegetation visible beneath the bridge
tall stone pillars marking the entrance to the path beyond the bridge

segments.scene_description: The cobblestone path gives way to a rickety wooden rope bridge spanning a dark marsh. Geralt crosses the weathered planks with stone gate pillars visible ahead, while mist rises from the water below and rope railings frame the view.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding dirt path through stone gate into deeper forest

events.description: passing through stone gate pillars from bridge onto dirt forest path

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing along the winding dirt path through the stone gate and into the darker forest beyond

entered.detail: muddy dirt trail with scattered stones and patches of grass replacing the wooden bridge
fallen logs or wooden barriers lining the right side of the path
dense bushes and ferns crowding the path edges

segments.scene_description: Geralt passes between the stone gate pillars onto a winding dirt trail. The wooden bridge and marsh fall behind as the path continues deeper into the forest, flanked by log barriers and thick undergrowth in the misty blue darkness.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark, atmospheric forest that transitions from a confined stone corridor to an open marshland and back into the deep woods. It begins with Geralt walking along a narrow cobblestone trail enclosed by stone retaining walls and a thick canopy of ancient trees that create a tunnel effect in the blue-tinted night light. As the path opens up, the cobblestones give way to a rickety wooden rope bridge spanning a dark, misty marsh, with rope railings framing the view toward stone gate pillars ahead. The scene then shifts as Geralt passes between these pillars and onto a winding dirt trail, leaving the bridge and water behind. Finally, the camera follows him deeper into the forest, where the path is flanked by log barriers and thick undergrowth shrouded in misty blue darkness.
